metadata.title: 2022: you can still hear the Specters arguing overhead.
tracklist: 02 .cutspace - how did we fend them off: the vitreous fettles which once devoured us?
03 .cutspace - there are Drums between the Bells, and no Thought will escape this unforgiving Density.
04 .cutspace - look Around! all the promises you've nursed are Swimming away.
05 .cutspace - i've seen Tall laughs perch on Curiosity's veneers.
06 .cutspace - knot these Murmurs, and remit to Tabula Rasa.
